message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Credential Issuance Flow

participant "User Agent" as UA
rectangle "Wallet" {
    participant "Frontend" as WF
    participant "Backend" as WB
}
rectangle "Issuer" {
    participant "Metadata" as IM
    participant "Web Site" as IW
    participant "Token Endpoint" as ITE
    participant "Credential Endpoint" as ICE
}

UA -> IW : get credential
activate IW
note right of IW: prepare credential issuance
IW --> WF : Issuance Initiation Request\n(pre-authz-code, credential_type, expected_key_types, issuer)
WF --> WB : Issuance Initiation Request\n(pre-authz-code, credential_type, expected_key_types, issuer)

WB -> WB : gen DPoP key
WB -> WB : gen DPoP proof for issuer token endpoint
WB -> WB : get nonce (for app attestation)
WB <- WB : nonce
WB -> WB : obtain app attestation (nonce)
WB -> WB : get assertion for code exchange\n(hash(pre-authz-code), app attestation)
WB -> WB : check app_attestation
WB -> WB : generate assertion\n(iss=wallet backend, pre_authz_code_hash, client_id)
WB -> WF : assertion
WF -> IM : get issuer metadata
WF -> ITE : token request\n(pre-authz-code, pin, client_id, assertion, dpop_proof)

note over WF,ITE: wallet authenticates with issuer as OAuth Client using the assertion issued by its backend (RFC 7523)\nissuer checks wallet backend id and key against trust registry
note over ITE: Token Endpoint validates pre-authorized code and creates corresponding access token
ITE --> WF : token response\n(access_token, c_nonce)

WF -> WF : gen key : key, key_attestation
WF -> WF : create proof of posssion (c_nonce)
WF -> WF : create DPoP proof for issuance request
WF -> ICE : issue credential\n(access_token, credential_type, format, proof, key_policy, dpop_proof)

note over ICE: Credential Endpoint Token checks whether the access token is good for requested credential type and\nwhether the proof of possession is valid
ICE --> WF : credential response (credential, format)
deactivate IW
@enduml
```
